feed.title: App Store Discounts（US）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:49753370488353792+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008699750812672+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1998 201 1797 90
US 1851 176 1675 72

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(US)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Happy Game :)
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$6.99 → $1.99 [$1.99 ~ $6.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$1.99

Application Description

A little boy falls asleep to a horrible nightmare. Can you make him happy again? - Brand new psychedelic horror adventure from the creators of Botanicula and CHUCHEL - Endure and escape three unforgettable nightmares - Solve deeply disturbing puzzles in (not so) charming environments - Deal with suspicious smiley faces and pink bunnies - Creepy songs and screeches from the Czech freakfolk band DVA

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Machinarium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$9.99 → $1.99 [$1.99 ~ $9.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$1.99

Application Description

Machinarium is the award-winning independent adventure game developed by the makers of Samorost series, Botanicula and CHUCHEL. Help Josef the robot to save his girlfriend Berta kidnapped by the Black Cap Brotherhood gang. "Absolutely Fantastic" - TouchArcade 4/4 - USA TODAY 4/4 - SlideToPlay 9/10 - Pocket Gamer Awards: - IGF, Excellence in Visual Art Award - Gamasutra, Best Indie Game Of The Year - VGChartz.com, Best Indie Game Of The Year

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Halls of Torment: Premium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$4.99 → $2.99 [$2.99 ~ $4.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$2.99

In-App Purchases

  • The Boglands DLC：$2.99
  • Supporter Pack：$0.99

Application Description

Halls of Torment is a horde survival game with a pre-rendered retro look reminiscent of RPGs from the late 90s. Choose one of many hero characters and descend into the deadly Halls of Torment. Fight unholy horrors from beyond and survive wave after wave of enemies until you face one of the tormented Lords. Strengthen your hero with character traits, abilities, and items. Create a new powerful build during each run. Explore various underground expanses and find new powerful items that enable you to venture even deeper into the abyss. First available on Steam, the 90's-style RPG survival roguelike, Halls of Torment, is now making its debut on mobile! 【Features】 ◆ Quick and casual 30 minute runs ◆ Old school pre-rendered art style ◆ Quest-based meta progression ◆ Large selection of diverse abilities, traits, and items, all enabling you to create interesting synergies ◆ Diverse bosses featuring unique mechanics and attack patterns ◆ Several distinct characters allowing for many different play styles ◆ Unlock and explore multiple interesting and challenging underground worlds ◆ Unique items can be sent up to the overworld and used to customize future runs ◆ Craft magical tinctures to direct fate in your favor ◆ Unlock the power of each class and combine them with your chosen character ◆ Find rare item variants to further improve your builds 【Full Content List】 ◆6 stages with unique environments ◆13 playable characters & character marks ◆20+ blessings that make you stronger for each run ◆80+ unique items to retrieve and unlock ◆240 higher rarity item variants ◆80+ abilities and ability upgrades ◆40+ artifacts to customize your game experience ◆35+ unique bosses ◆70+ unique monsters ◆500 quests to complete ◆1000+ traits that upgrade characters and abilities Our content list is still growing, expect more in the future! 【Contact Us】 Discord: @Erabit or join via https://discord.gg/Gkje2gzCqB Email: prglobal@erabitstudios.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: where I put it
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$0.99 → Free [Free ~ $0.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

A simple cleanup management app that will quickly find your search! Do you have trouble Looking for items? Find your item quickly with "where I put it”! Build a house, make furniture, assign lockers, and put all your belongings. Books, important collections, hobby tools, children's toys, seasonal clothes, and items of recollections, the app will help you organize all things in the house.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Cello Tuner Professional
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$12.99 → $9.99 [Free ~ $12.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$9.99

In-App Purchases

  • Tuning Fork：$1.99
  • Settings：$1.99

Application Description

Tune your cello instantly with precision and ease! Optimal for beginners, intermediate and advanced musicians! · The most accurate - displays the exact sound frequency in Hz. · Calibration for A: 392Hz, 415Hz, 432Hz, 440Hz, 441Hz, 442Hz, 443Hz, 444Hz, 466Hz. · Instant load and fastest tuning! - Optimized for latest devices. · Highest responsiveness and sensitivity. · Intuitive user interface with LED tuning indicator. · Visual indicators - tuned string lights up. · Universal app - works with iPhone, iPad and iPod touch. · Advanced settings (A4 calibration, Mic sensitivity, Sound notifications) and Tuning fork! (as in-app purchases) What our users say: "Does what it promises - Very useful app." "This app makes tuning so easy!" "By far the greatest and most accurate cello tuning app. Play the string, read its chart and you know whether you're in tune." "Amazing! Outstanding, well spent money! "All cellists should have this app!" "It's very useful for me! Thank you!" "Excellent app" "Very convenient software. Suitable for any skill!" --- Please make sure to allow microphone access to this app when prompted. Check it under Settings>Privacy>Microphone. Thank you. --- Got ideas? Questions? Please send us your feedback through our site or to feedback@daikyoujulabs.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.content:

All Price Information

Price：$12.99

In-App Purchases

  • Tuning Fork：$1.99
  • Settings：$1.99

Tune your cello instantly with precision and ease! Optimal for beginners, intermediate and advanced musicians! · The most accurate - displays the exact sound frequency in Hz. · Calibration for A: 392Hz, 415Hz, 432Hz, 440Hz, 441Hz, 442Hz, 443Hz, 444Hz, 466Hz. · Instant load and fastest tuning! - Optimized for latest devices. · Highest responsiveness and sensitivity. · Intuitive user interface with LED tuning indicator. · Visual indicators - tuned string lights up. · Universal app - works with iPhone, iPad and iPod touch. · Advanced settings (A4 calibration, Mic sensitivity, Sound notifications) and Tuning fork! (as in-app purchases) What our users say: "Does what it promises - Very useful app." "This app makes tuning so easy!" entry.title: Little Nightmares
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$7.99 → $2.99 [$2.99 ~ $8.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$2.99

Application Description

Escape your childhood fears. First available on PC and consoles, the horror adventure tale Little Nightmares is available on mobile!  Immerse yourself in Little Nightmares, a dark whimsical tale that will confront you with your childhood fears! Help Six escape The Maw – a vast, mysterious vessel inhabited by corrupted souls looking for their next meal. As you progress on your journey, explore the most disturbing dollhouse offering a prison to escape from and a playground full of secrets to discover. Reconnect with your inner child to unleash your imagination and find the way out! Little Nightmares features a subtle mix of action and puzzle-platformer mechanics rooted in an eerie artistic direction and creepy sound design. Sneak your way out of the Maw’s dreary maze and run from its corrupted inhabitants to escape your childhood fears. FEATURES - Tiptoe your way through a dark and thrilling adventure - Rediscover your childhood fears inside a haunting vessel and escape its eerie inhabitants - Climb, crawl and hide through nightmarish environments to solve tricky platform puzzles - Immerse yourself in the Maw through its creepy sound design CAREFULLY REDESIGNED FOR MOBILE - Revamped interface - Game Center achievements - Compatible with MFi controllers If you run into a problem, please contact us at https://playdigious.helpshift.com/hc/en/12-playdigious/ with as much information as possible on the issue.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Planetary Hours + Widget
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$1.99 → Free [Free ~ $1.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

The planetary hours are based on an ancient astrological system, the Chaldean order of the planets. Planetary hours are controlled by the 7 visible planets of the Solar system. In the Chaldaical order planets are arranged in the following sequence: Saturn, Jupiter, Mars, Sun, Venus, Mercury and Moon. Each planet controls the hour, which belongs to it accordingly. Every planet has its own individual characteristics and energy, which clearly show themselves during the associated hour. Considering spheres of planetary influence, particular matters, which are implemented on certain planetary hours come out for better or for worse. Choose a favorable time for making your plans, while considering the planet hours, and you will stay successful and happy!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Road to Empress I
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • total chapter：$19.49 → $17.49 [$17.49 ~ $19.49]

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

In-App Purchases

  • Jade Seal - Golden Era：$5.79
  • 600 Flowers：$0.99
  • 600 Eggs：$0.99
  • 3,000 Flowers：$4.99
  • 12,800 Flowers：$19.99
  • 6,800 Flowers：$9.99
  • 12,800 Eggs：$19.99
  • 6,800 Eggs：$9.99
  • 3,000 Eggs：$4.99
  • total chapter：$17.49

Application Description

This work requires a constant internet connection. The full content consists of all 16 chapters, including chapters 1-2 (already purchased) and chapters 3-16 which need to be purchased to unlock. You've never played anything like this before—Road to Empress I, a cinematic palace challenge where your move shapes the palace drama! Full 4K Live-Action Star-Studded Performance Watch real drama unfold through the eyes of talented actors performing on lavishly crafted sets. Featuring Kuan Hung, Evie Huang, Zeawo, Hana Lin, Zi Yu, Qi Xiaxia, and an ensemble cast who bring the imperial court to life in breathtaking 4K detail. Everything has been meticulously recreated to pull you deep into the heart of ancient China's most glorious palace. Your Choices Shape History This is where film meets gaming in perfect harmony. Every choice matters. One moment of misplaced trust could send you spiraling into betrayal and death. Who's manipulating you? Who can you manipulate in return? Survive to Rule Rising from obscurity to ultimate power out of multiple deadly story branches takes cunning, charm, and wisdom. The crown awaits... if you live long enough to claim it. Uncover the Palace's Darkest Secrets Behind the golden facade of the imperial court lies a web of forbidden desires, deadly conspiracies, and buried truths. The Prince's secret affair with the court bard, the Princess's hidden lover, the vengeful spirits haunting the abandoned Cold Palace... Every scandal of the ancient dynasty awaits your discovery. Multiple Playthroughs With over 8 hours of cinematic content, no two playthroughs are alike. Your choices don't just change the story; they define who you become. Earn a personalized Trait Sketch based on your decisions, collect beautiful traditional artifacts, unlock hidden storylines, and crown your favorite characters in global popularity contests! About New One Studio We are an independent creative team focused on crafting full-motion video experiences that blend Eastern culture with interactive storytelling. Our goal is to create immersive experiences that cross cultural boundaries. In 2019, The Invisible Guardian received BAFTA recognition and connected with millions through its non-linear narrative and deep exploration of moral choices. Now we return with "Road to Empress," weaving the ancient dynasty legends into an interactive experience that bridges cultures and centuries. Step into our world of palace intrigue, where ancient wisdom meets modern storytelling, and every choice echoes through history. Inspired by the ancient dynasty legends, we create Road to Empress I. Chapters 1-16 dive into the empress's legendary beginnings. Watch an unknown girl proceed with caution in palace crawling with enemies, using extraordinary wit and remarkable courage to outlast brutal power struggles, slowly making her name. These are the most nail-biting years—calm before storm, plotting rise while staying under radar. Every move sets stage for her ultimate climb to power pyramid's top. More chapters under development. Stay tuned! YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@RoadtoEmpressOfficial TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@roadtoempressen Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/roadtoempress/ X: https://x.com/roadtoempressen Discord: https://discord.gg/roadtoempress

entry.title: Clank!
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$10.99 → $6.99 [$6.99 ~ $10.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$6.99

In-App Purchases

  • Sunken Treasures：$8.99
  • Mummy's Curse：$8.99

Application Description

Burgle your way to adventure in the award-winning board game! A New Adventure Begins! Clank!, the iconic deck-building board game adventure, challenges daring thieves to sneak into a dragon’s lair, steal one of her precious artifacts, and escape – before you’re roasted to a crisp! Winning fans and awards around the world, Clank! is one of the most-beloved modern board games, with a wide range of expansions and adaptations for players to enjoy. How Deep will you Delve? The deeper you go, the more valuable treasures you’ll find…but the harder it will be to escape! So be quick and be quiet: One false step and – CLANK! Each careless sound risks drawing the dragon’s attention. You’re competing against your fellow thieves to claim the most valuable prize…but you can only enjoy your loot if you make it out of the depths alive! Choose Your Path You’ll need a good pair of boots, a sharp sword, and all your roguish skills to survive in the dungeon. Along the way, you’ll acquire new items, abilities, and allies that will help you achieve victory! Blending deck-building and exploration, Clank! offers a unique dungeon-delving adventure each time you play." Many Ways to Play Learn the ropes in a guided Tutorial, then hone your abilities by collecting Achievements and completing Challenges. Play cross-platform against friends, or compete in exciting new Heists that put you up against players from around the world! However you choose to enter the dungeon: Good luck!...you’re going to need it!

entry.title: Tokyo Train!
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$2.99 → $0.49 [$0.29 ~ $2.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.49

Application Description

Run Japan's trains! No railroad knowledge is required to play "Tokyo Train!". This game is a brain game with simple rules but requires a lot of brain power. Customers are waiting at the station for the trains to arrive to take them to their destinations. Start the trains and transport your customers. You will earn money for every passenger who boards a train. Adjust the interval between runs and the number of cars to achieve the highest revenue. Departing trains costs money. If you send out too many trains and the boarding rate drops, you will lose your revenue. The operation method is very easy and the rules are simple. All you have to do is adjust the number of train cars and make the trains depart at the best time. As the game progresses, express fares will also appear. No technical knowledge is required at all. Both people who like trains and people who like games can quickly understand and enjoy the game. There are no in-app purchases. There are no ads. Please concentrate on the game. Share your operating results on social media.

entry.title: Dune: Imperium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$10.99 → $6.99 [$6.99 ~ $10.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$6.99

In-App Purchases

  • Dune: Imperium - Rise of Ix：$9.99
  • Dune: Imperium - Immortality：$9.99

Application Description

Immerse yourself in the world of Dune. Experience the ultimate blend of strategy and intrigue as you navigate the treacherous landscapes of Arrakis in the award-winning board game Dune: Imperium! Battle online, locally with AI, or against the formidable House Hagal. Earn Achievements that showcase your prowess as a leader. Embark on more than a dozen Challenges that will test your wit and cunning. Compete for badges in the rotating Skirmish Mode where no two games are the same! Control the Spice. Control the Universe. Arrakis. Dune. Desert Planet. Raise your banner above the vast wasteland before you. As the Great Houses of the Landsraad marshal their forces and their spies, whom will you influence, and whom will you betray? A tyrannical Emperor. The secretive Bene Gesserit. The shrewd Spacing Guild. The ferocious Fremen of the Deep Desert. The power of the Imperium can be yours, but war is not the only way to claim it. Dune: Imperium blends deck-building and worker placement in a deeply thematic new strategy game where the fate of the Empire hangs on your decisions. Will you seek political allies or rely upon military might? Economic strength or subtle intrigues? A council seat… or a sharpened blade? The cards are dealt. The choice is yours. The Imperium awaits.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Ark Nova
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$10.99 → $7.99 [$7.99 ~ $10.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$7.99

Application Description

Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects in an acclaimed strategy board game. In Ark Nova, you will plan and design a modern, scientifically managed zoo. With the ultimate goal of owning the most successful zoological establishment, you will build enclosures, accommodate animals, and support conservation projects all over the world. Specialists and unique buildings will help you in achieving this goal. At the heart of Ark Nova are 255 cards featuring animals, specialists, unique enclosures, and conservation projects, each with a particular ability. Use them to increase the appeal and scientific reputation of your zoo and to collect conservation points. Each player has a set of action cards, which you will use and upgrade to carry out your plans. Each player has a set of five action cards to manage their gameplay, and the power of an action is determined by the slot the card currently occupies. The cards are: BUILD: Allows you to build standard or special enclosures, kiosks, and pavilions. ANIMALS: Allows you to accommodate animals in your zoo. CARDS: Allows you to gain new zoo cards (animals, sponsors, and conservation project cards). ASSOCIATION: Allows your association workers to carry out different tasks. SPONSORS: Allows you to play a sponsor card in your zoo or to raise money. With high replayability and rich components, Ark Nova provides a remarkable gaming experience that will bring the game to the table again and again.

entry.title: Root Board Game
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$9.99 → $4.99 [$3.99 ~ $9.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$4.99

In-App Purchases

  • The Riverfolk Expansion：$9.99
  • Root: The Underworld Expansion：$9.99
  • Exiles & Partisans & Vagabonds：$7.99
  • Root: The Marauder Expansion：$9.99
  • The Clockwork Expansion：$5.99
  • Hirelings & Landmarks：$9.99

Application Description

Play the digital adaptation of the beloved tabletop board game. Root is a game of adventure and war where 2 to 4 players battle for control of a vast wilderness. The nefarious Marquise de Cat has seized the great woodland, intent on harvesting its riches. Under her rule, the many creatures of the forest have banded together. This Alliance will seek to strengthen its resources and subvert the rule of Cats. In this effort, the Alliance may enlist the help of the wandering Vagabonds who are able to move through the more dangerous woodland paths. Though some may sympathize with the Alliance’s hopes and dreams, these wanderers are old enough to remember the great birds of prey who once controlled the woods. Meanwhile, at the edge of the region, the proud, squabbling Eyrie have found a new commander who they hope will lead their faction to resume their ancient birthright. The stage is set for a contest that will decide the fate of the great woodland. It is up to the players to decide which group will ultimately take root.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: 聖經(和合本)(繁體中英對照)
entry.id: 聖經(和合本)(繁體中英對照)-us-1779127532173
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • La Bible：$5.99 → $1.99 [$1.99 ~ $5.99]

All Price Information

Price：$4.99

In-App Purchases

  • La Biblia：$1.99
  • 日本聖書：$1.99
  • La Bible：$1.99
  • 聖經(粤语朗读)：$5.99
  • 圣经(普通话朗读)：$5.99
  • 圣经(简体文本)：$1.99
  • English Bible(audio)：$5.99

Application Description

聖經(和合本)(繁體中英對照) Application contains traditional Chinese bible and English bible for reference reading. 可自由選擇中英對照, 繁體中文或英文聖經閱讀. 請參考在PalReader 網站上的使用錄像來深入了解此應用程序. 閱讀程序具有以下先進功能: 專為iPhone 而做的存儲優化, 存儲相同的圖書比其它程序節省超過30%的空間. 全屏幕閱讀支持. LoudReader 只在用戶需要時顯示控制對話框, 而其它iPhone 閱讀程序顯示控制始終佔用寶貴的屏幕. 支持任意方向閱讀. 程序自動調整圖書顯示方式. 使用HTML顯示圖書的多種字體與圖像, 優於其它程序的單一字體文本顯示方式. 頁內捲動控制幫助讀者在長頁面內快速移動到任意位置. 直觀調整字體大小,顏色以及背景. 手指雙擊擊即可使用的章節選擇, 字體大小控制. 歷史記憶功能幫助用戶快速到任意章節或前後章節 準確回到上次閱讀位置(甚至包括上次卷滾條位置) 操作簡介 每一章為一長頁, 用手指拖動卷滾或輕擊頁面上部1/4或下部1/4進行向上或向下翻頁. 雙擊頁面即可彈出控制面板. 閱讀器的操作由這一個彈出式控制面板控制, 簡單直觀方便易用. 如希望快速在頁面內移動, 可用控制面板小滾輪選擇頁面位置百分比. 輕擊綠色的箭頭控制章節導航的後退和前進. 退出閱讀器時程序會自動記住最後的閱讀位置(甚至包括上次卷滾條位置), 下次進入閱讀器時程序直接打開到此處.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: 召喚騎士團
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • 故事模式+自由模式合集：$8.99 → $5.39 [$4.49 ~ $8.99]
  • 劇情模式：$4.99 → $2.99 [$2.49 ~ $4.99]
  • 自由模式：$4.99 → $2.99 [$2.49 ~ $4.99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • 故事模式+自由模式合集：$5.39
  • 劇情模式：$2.99
  • 自由模式：$2.99

Application Description

'Call of Knights' is a pixel-style RPG card game developed by Olive Panda Studio. The game consists of two main parts: 'Song of the Knights' and 'Shining Stars' . Players can access the full game content through free download and optional in-app purchases. 【In-App Purchases】 Full Content Unlock: $8.99 USD Story Mode of 'Song of the Knight': $4.99 USD Free Mode of 'Shining Stars': $4.99 USD Both modes support free trial before purchase. 'Song of the Knights' can be played for free up to the end of Chapter 2, while 'Shining Stars' can be experienced freely for one in-game year. Note: Prices may vary depending on local exchange rates. Song of the Knights: This story mode is adapted from Nobel Prize-winning author Henryk Sienkiewicz's 'The Teutonic Knights'. The gameplay combines card-based battles with RPG character development, featuring a companion skill combo system where different cards trigger unique partner skills, allowing players to build various strategic decks. Along the journey, players will meet and recruit many companions, embarking on a grand and epic adventure. Shining Stars: Set in the magical continent of Antana, this mode features six culturally distinct nations. Players take on the role of a minor lord from one of the kingdoms. As the demon realm prepares to invade, players must travel the land, recruit companions, form their own knight order, and grow stronger to defend the front lines of humanity. 【Device Support】 iOS 10.0 or later Devices with 3GB RAM or more iPhone 7 or newer iPad Air 3 or newer 【Contact Us】 If you need help during the game or encounter any issues, feel free to contact us via email. Official Email: knight@longyougame.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Island Story: 100 Days
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$3.99 → $1.99 [Free ~ $3.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$1.99

Application Description

You wake up on the beach of a mysterious tropical island after a shipwreck. Survival is your only goal: build shelter, craft tools, find food and fresh water, and uncover the island's hidden secrets! ■ Simple Controls • Tap to move and gather resources. ■ Survival • Eating wild fruits alone won't satisfy your hunger. • Catch fish in a mini-game, or craft traps for meat. ■ Realistic Health System • Staying healthy is a constant struggle. • Manage a complex system of needs: weight, wounds, hunger, thirst, energy, body temperature, insect bites… ■ Upgrade Your Camp • Gather resources to craft tools and build furniture. ■ Dynamic Weather • Changing weather limits your movements and can disrupt daily plans. ■ Self-Sufficiency • Learn to grow crops, raise goats, and bake bread from scratch. ■ Relaxation • Immerse yourself in natural white noise. --------- No in-app purchases · No ads

entry.title: Be Focused Pro - Focus Timer
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$19.99 → $11.99 [Free ~ $19.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$11.99

Application Description

Staying on task seems is a real challenge for our screen-bound generation. The Be Focused lets you get things done by breaking up individual tasks among discrete intervals, separated by short breaks. It’s a surprisingly effective way to retain motivation and focus. Create tasks, configure breaks and track your progress throughout the day, week or custom period. Use Be Focused on your iPhone, iPad, or Mac — everything stays perfectly in sync. Task Management • Create and manage tasks • Add notes and due dates to tasks • Organize tasks with tags and filters • Paste task lists from other apps Timer Control • Start, pause, or skip intervals • Auto-start the next interval (optionally) • Plan intervals needed for task completion and track accuracy • Manage completed intervals Timer Customization • Set durations for work sessions, short and long breaks • Define number of intervals before a long break • Set a daily goal for completed intervals • Assign different timer settings to individual tasks Reports • View detailed reports to monitor your progress • Export your data in CSV format Sounds and Notifications • Chronometer ticking sound with adjustable frequency • Variety of alarm sounds • Interactive notifications • Adjustable volume for alarms and chronometer Integration • Sync across all your devices (iPhone, iPad, Mac) * • Integration with Focus Matrix to manage tasks using urgent/important principle ** • Integration with Shortcuts app to automate workflow Quick Access • Widgets for Lock Screen and Home Screen • Live activities for Lock Screen and Dynamic Island • Control to start or stop the timer from the Lock Screen, Controls Center, or Action Button Automation • Integration with Shortcuts app (control tasks and timers via Shortcuts app) • Automate Shortcuts execution on events in Be Focused app Device Support • Apple Watch support • Also available for Mac • Dark and Light mode support * Sync with Mac requires Be Focused Pro for macOS, sold separately. ** Integration with Focus Matrix requires the Pro version of Focus Matrix, sold separately.
